title: Bridge Essay: Brain activity during meditation in first-time meditators.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Brain activity during meditation in first-time meditators.** — Int J Neurosci. PMID: 33765903. DOI: 10.1080/00207454.2021.1909010. The electrophysiological correlates of meditation states in both short and long-term meditators have been increasingly documented; however, little is known about the brain activity associated with first-time meditation experiences. The goal of this study was to investigate the electrophysiological correlates of asingle guided mindfulness meditation session in subjects with no previous meditation experience.
